full_text:
Zhu Zhan
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhu Zhan. Part of Emperor Xian’s fleeing Han court, killed in the battle of Hongnong. Zhu Zhan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Zhu Zhan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
